title: pleopeltis interrupta
intro: Pleopeltis interrupta, also known as the interrupted polypody fern, is a type of vascular plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis interrupta include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Pleopeltis interrupta can be made into a tea or infusion, or used as a topical application, to harness its medicinal properties.
